_meta.purpose: Leonoria campaign seeds and adventure templates. Used as structural templates for procedural adventure generation.
notes: Each entry is a campaign seed — a framework for a full adventure arc in Leonoria.
themes: Narrative tags used when procedurally selecting campaign tone.
primary_biome: The main biome the campaign takes place in.
key_factions: Major factions the players interact with.
signature_locations: Named locations central to the campaign.
unique_mechanics: Custom subsystems relevant to this campaign.
starting_hook: The inciting incident that draws players in.

biome_expeditions.title: The Descent Into Memory
biome_expeditions.starting_hook: A Dornak mining team has broken through into an uncharted Forgotten Kingdom hall. Three miners came back. The rest are still in there — and they can hear them talking below.

boss_encounters.name: The Forgotten King
boss_encounters.notes: Must shatter throne to prevent reformation

boss_encounters.name: The Deep Construct Overseer
boss_encounters.notes: Power conduit must be destroyed separately

unique_mechanics: Void Exposure (Conviction drain per round in deep zones)
Magical Darkness penalty (-15% all rolls for non-Velkaar)
Cave-in risk (structural integrity checks)

biome_expeditions.title: What Grows in the Dark
biome_expeditions.starting_hook: The miasma from the Boglands is spreading north. Farmland in the Midlands border is dying. Someone needs to go in, find what has changed, and stop it — or confirm it cannot be stopped.

boss_encounters.name: The Broodmother
boss_encounters.notes: Death causes permanent Boglands environmental shift

unique_mechanics: Miasma Stacks (Blight accumulation without protection)
Quicksand tiles (navigation checks)
Complete disorientation (map accuracy degrades per hour without a guide)

biome_expeditions.title: The Things That Wait in Cold
biome_expeditions.encounter_style: survival and exploration with sudden violent encounters
biome_expeditions.starting_hook: A Thyraen Vigil Knight arrived at a Midlands border post, alone, and will only say three words: 'It walks again.' No one knows what 'it' refers to. The Thyraen do not explain. Someone needs to go north and find out.

boss_encounters.name: The Stillness
boss_encounters.notes: Fire is the only reliable damage type

boss_encounters.name: The White Hunger
boss_encounters.notes: Targets lowest HP — protect your weakest member

unique_mechanics: Blizzard events (visibility drops to 0)
Frostbite (Conviction drain per round)
Crevasse collapse (terrain checks while moving fast)

biome_expeditions.title: The Grove That Remembers
biome_expeditions.tone: serene but dangerous, beautiful and hostile
biome_expeditions.encounter_style: exploration and social with combat escalation
biome_expeditions.starting_hook: An Aelthiryn has appeared in a Midlands market town — the first one seen outside The Sanctuary Lands in living memory. She is looking for something, will not say what, and is frightened. Something is wrong in the Inner Forest.
key_factions: The Warden of the Inner Forest

boss_encounters.name: The Warden of the Inner Forest
boss_encounters.notes: Cannot be permanently killed without destroying the First Grove — diplomacy is a valid win condition

unique_mechanics: Materium Surges (spells misfire randomly)
Impassable Growth (Warden creates terrain tiles)
Ancient Wards (triggered by hostile intent, not action)

political_intrigue.title: The Weight of Grey
political_intrigue.encounter_style: social and information-gathering with combat eruptions
political_intrigue.starting_hook: A shipping merchant was found dead in a Gleam Havens harbour — perfectly, geometrically dead. No rage, no struggle. Someone planned this with extreme precision. Three other merchants have received warnings with the same geometric signature.

boss_encounters.name: The Grey Harbourmaster
boss_encounters.notes: Cornered, he negotiates — killing him collapses the regional economy

unique_mechanics: Information Network (boss knows party composition before combat)
Logical Escape Clause (prepared exit below 30% HP)
Economic Instability (player choices affect regional trade for years)

ancient_mysteries.title: Before The Velkaar
ancient_mysteries.encounter_style: exploration and puzzle with construct combat
ancient_mysteries.starting_hook: A Dornak archivist found a chamber that predates the Forgotten Kingdom by at least three thousand years. The stone is different. The inscriptions are in no known language. The constructs inside are still running.

boss_encounters.name: The Deep Construct Overseer
boss_encounters.notes: Not hostile by design — its program makes it lethal

unique_mechanics: Unknown Language Puzzles (Scholar aptitude checks)
Ancient Ward Discharge (AoE trap rooms)
Program Logic (construct focuses one target until removed from threat list)

survival_and_exploration.title: The Changed Road
survival_and_exploration.starting_hook: The shortest route between two major trade cities goes through the Badlands. The road used to take three days. The last party that attempted it never arrived. The one before that arrived changed.

boss_encounters.name: The Ul'Karash Patriarch
boss_encounters.notes: May be reasoned with — the Ul'Karash are territorial, not hostile by nature

boss_encounters.name: The Mutation Breach
boss_encounters.notes: Environmental combat — winning means collapsing the breach, not killing a creature

unique_mechanics: Heat Stroke (Conviction drain in open sun)
Transformative Exposure (prolonged stay changes character traits)
Navigation Failure (the Badlands shifts — paths do not stay constant)

survival_and_exploration.title: The Bone Count
survival_and_exploration.starting_hook: The Krothan raiding patterns have changed. Instead of scattered hits on border settlements, they are moving in formation — organized. Something is leading them. A Skarn border garrison sent a message that never arrived.
key_factions: Gruthen Forest Communities (caught in the middle)

boss_encounters.name: The Krothan Warchief
boss_encounters.notes: His death triggers Krothan succession ritual — warband fights itself

unique_mechanics: Near-Total Darkness (-15% all non-Skarn rolls at ground level)
Fear Presence (enemies below 40 Conviction lose initiative first encounter)
Sound Carries (stealth is harder — every action risks detection)
